programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Drew and Agatha have to deal with a dog with a broken leg brought in by a group of youngsters with no money. Will Agatha stand up to Drew who has decided to send them away to find money, by insisting the dog stays at the clinic?

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Switzerland - Jungfrau
programme.desc: From early morning cheese-making to yodeling through the Alps, Ashley goes back to her Swiss roots in the mountains. The sweetness and secret recipe to their most prestigious chocolate is revealed.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: Some of the forests with the most character in the world are the juniper woods. Each juniper tree has its own shape. Juniper woodlands are open and adapted to cold and dry climates. They are of a unique beauty emerging from between bare rock.

programme.title: Asia - Secret Lives, Hidden Places
programme.desc: The man who saved the last colony of Guizhou golden monkeys is getting old. He must pass the responsibility on to the next in line. But will his successor be able to keep the monkeys safe?

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats: Episode 4
programme.desc: Recently Priscilla bought an adopted boy pup from a rival gang to the Gosa Burrow. Unfortunately his acceptance into the Gosa group was far from ideal.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage has a rather unique resident who is renowned as nature's lumberjack and North America's largest rodent, the beaver. With their powerful teeth, the trees they fell can be huge, and their dams can be seen from space.

programme.title: On The Trails Of The Glaciers
programme.desc: Mission to Alaska

programme.title: In the Feeding Grounds of the Humpback Whales
programme.desc: In the warm Pacific just off the coast of Maui, a humpback whale mother has paired and given birth to her baby. Now, the time has come, whereby she has to take her baby on a 5.500-kilometre-long journey to the grazing grounds off Alaska.

programme.title: Secret Seychelles: D'Arros
programme.desc: D'Arros is one of the Seychelles' best kept secrets. Safe-guarded by isolation, the island is a jewel of the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI DESTINATIONS
programme.desc: Sango Lodge

programme.title: Finding Little Italy
programme.desc: Liguria is more than just a glamorous stretch of Riviera coastline; it is a land of picture-perfect villages, atmospheric ghost towns, elegant seaside gems and grandiose villas.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, the four remaining bat-eared fox pups face a struggle for survival. Cheetah Outreach founder Annie, stops by to observe their progress.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina visits Imire Rhino and Wildlife Conservancy where she is shown around by the founder's grandson, Riley. She has the opportunity to learn about and interact with elephants that have been trained to track poachers.

programme.title: Wild Memoirs of a Film Crew
programme.desc: In this episode, the film crew and presenters reflect on heart-stopping wild encounters.

programme.title: Rock Of Ages
programme.desc: Rocks are the memory of our planet. Their constant reforming cycle captures moments in time, so if you want to know about evolution, extinction, or creation, look in the rocks. The question is, are you ready to rock?

programme.title: The Wildlife
programme.desc: Episode 10

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina travels to the Mana Pools National Park with guide Craig van Zyl. They come across mating lions, have close encounters with bull elephants and canoe just meters away from imposing hippos and crocodiles on the mighty Zambezi River.

programme.desc: The team searches for an escaped convict.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing

programme.title: Step Up: High Water

programme.title: Greenleaf

programme.title: A que no puedes

programme.title: 100 latinos dijeron

programme.title: Mi sueño es bailar

programme.title: Race in 30
programme.desc: Formula 1 is a sport like no other and the Formula 1 Channel is the ultimate destination to catch up on all the action from F1, F2, F3 and F1 Academy races throughout the season, including analysis, replays and documentaries.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: From May 23, 2021.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: From Circuit de Monaco.

programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: From F2 pole to F1 points; Oliver Bearman grabs the headlines on his maiden Formula 1 outing.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: Join us to hear from F1 Academy Managing Director, Susie Wolff, on all things F1 Academy and find out what the drivers have been up to pre-season, plus highlights from Qualifying and both Races.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: Come and join us for a day in Miami with F1 Academy drivers, Courtney Crone and Nerea Marti, and hear from Doriane Pin after her dominating weekend at the first round of the 2024 season in Saudi.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: There's plenty of action on and off-track as we go behind the scenes with series leader, Abbi Pulling and celebrate International Women in Engineering day with Ruth Buscombe. Watch highlights from qualifying and both races as the action heats up!

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: The sand dunes of Circuit Zandvoort host round 4 of F1 Academy, as we see who is going to challenge series leader, Abbi Pulling, at the mid-point of the 2024 season.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: We learn more about driver support and talent pathways with F1 Academy's Katie Baldwin, and take a trip out with Tina Hausmann and Lola Lovinfosse for a birds-eye view of the track.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: Formula 1 is a sport like no other and the Formula 1 Channel is the ultimate destination to catch up on all the action from F1, F2, F3 and F1 Academy races throughout the season, including analysis, replays and documentaries.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: It's the final F1 Academy event of 2024. Chloe Chambers has a 'high-flying' introduction to the Al Qubaisis' home-life and we learn all about Champions of the Future Academy Championship.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: The Formula One grid competes in the first Chinese Grand Prix since 2019. Lewis Hamilton is a six-time winner of this race, including four of the last six runnings. Max Verstappen returned to the winner's circle in Japan, but has yet to win in China.

programme.title: Race in 30
programme.desc: Catch up on the key moments from Shanghai - a race featuring a first home Grand Prix for Zhou Guanyu, plenty of overtakes and much more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El resto de los Chefs deberán preparar un plato a base de cangrejos y cada equipo presentará su plato más fuerte al Chef Ramsay. Durante el servicio de cena, los equipos crean sus propios menús.

programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.desc: Jay and Nya have to cut their first date in Mega-Monster Amusement Park short as the Serpentine are on their way to retrieve the first or four fang blades to be used to awaken the Great Devourer.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him; he tells Jestro he’s not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn’t listen.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him; he tells Jestro he’s not ready for that kind of power.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they’re booed and pelted with food.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.”

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin steals a statue called the Stone Child from the Metropolitan Art Museum; he and Fujiko make their getaway in a Cessna, but they crash at the Bermuda Triangle. They encounter a ghost ship at this grave of many ships and planes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Foodie and gourmet aficionado Baron Gourmel says he wants to eat Lupin's brain. He claims he'd offer his own 70-million dollar jewelry collection to anyone who could capture Lupin. Fujiko hears of it and informs Lupin right away.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin III learns that his grandfather Arsène Lupin's secret treasures are buried in his grave. Lupin learns of its location with Fujiko's microfilm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are surrounded, as usual, as they are trying to escape after a jewelry theft. But somebody shoots at Zenigata and hits him dead on. Lupin learns of the even the next morning in the papers, and Fujiko and Goemon get implicated.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of the Duchy of Blanco has a one-of-a-kind gold coin of Hannibal hidden in his chest; well, Lupin and crew are after it. Amidst their scheming, Jigen is challenged to a duel with a man named Stoneman.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of France has run up a ridiculous tab with Maxim of Paris, and orders the Louvre Museum proprietor to sell a painting to cover his bill. But the proprietor doesn't want to let it go, and takes the painting out of the museum.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin recieves a letter about Marie Antoinette's jeweled crown, and sneaks into the palace of Versailles. A young man called Oscar appears, the sender of the letter.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin was told by Fujiko to steal a pistol of the Wilhem family worth 500 million pounds. Meanwhile, a man named Jim Benkei, a giant of a man who's stirred troubled in London, steals Jigen's favorite Magnum ...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the various jewels at the World Fair in Los Angeles. Lupin learns from Fujiko that a man named Harry Satler is also after the jewels, so he decides to go see who this guy is. The man he meets is a wizened old man…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Pestered by Fujiko, Lupin has to steal a golden bed that was originally made by Louis XIV for Josephine. He makes a plan with Jigen and Goemon, but the owner of the bed, Morgan, is a formidable opponent who has WWII military experience.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Heike Clan and Minamoto Clan once battled on Devil's Head Island at the inland sea of Seto; Fujiko and Lupin go there to find out about the details behind the legend of the battle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vivian dreams of becoming a star some day, but her auditions are a bust. She thinks of using Lupin to become famous; she makes Lupin engage in thievery, and informs reporters to be at the site to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Catherine rescues Lupin and Jigen, who are pursued by Zenigata as usual. She's an old acquaintance of Jigen's, and provokes Jigen to steal a 140-karat diamond from her own mansion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Wolf and Rose are a cool hitmen duo with the ambition of rising to the top of the hitman business by killing Lupin. They capture Goemon and torture him to confess about Lupin's weaknesses. Lupin learns that Goemon is in danger.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The chief of the police department accused of mismanagement on Lupin's release, hit the prime minister out of anger and was dismissed. Zenigata thinks that Lupin is the only arrest to avenge the chief's death, and starts an operation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The painting "The First Supper" hides clues to an heirloom that Christ received from Virgin Mary. This painting has been kept by the clan of Judah for generations, and a woman named Nova knows where the painting is hidden.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Mona Lisa never leaves the Louvre Museum. Arsène Lupin tried unsuccessfully to steal her and Lupin III wants her for his collection, however, and fireworks ignite between him and Zenigata in charge of security.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Lupin is after is the Golden Treasure Ship at Mount Horai. It's said that the Seven Lucky Gods conferred this treasure, which is shown in public only once a year when the New Year's bell rings at the belfry of Kohoji Temple.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 6/20/15: Max Scherzer carried a perfect game into the 9th inning against the Pirates, but a hit-by-pitch cost him the chance at perfection. However, the Nationals ace just needed to get through one more batter to finish off his first career no-hitter.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/2021: The Dodgers beat the Giants, 2-1, in Game 5 of the 2021 National League Division Series thanks to an RBI single from Cody Bellinger in the top of the 9th inning and an unlikely save from Max Scherzer.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 8/21/22: Mark Canha belts a three-run homer in the 7th inning to tie the game, then slugs a two-run go-ahead big fly in the top of the 9th to help the Mets rally for a 10-9 win over the Phillies.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/23/88 - The Yankees headed to the bottom of the 9th down 4-3 to the Red Sox. Rickey Henderson helped orchestrate the tying run and give New York hope. Bases loaded and two outs, Claudell Washington scored the winning run on an error by Jody Reed.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The Paternity drama explodes on today's MAURY! Could one woman's twins really have 2 different fathers? It's a one in a million DNA shot, but one that we have seen before on our show. Plus more wild DNA results on today's MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: New mom Danica received 5 different emails from 5 women claiming that they slept with her man Jimmy in her home. Then, will Renee's man choose his addiction over his family?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shantice is worried sick that her husband is cheating on her with prostitutes. Could Heather's fiancé have impregnated another woman? Plus, Karlissa's world may shatter when she finds out if her man cheated on her with her best friend.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Erica kicked her boyfriend Martez out of their house and life. But she's willing to give him a second chance if he proves that he didn't hurt her 4-year-old son! Then, Christy's ex Stephen refuses to admit that he fathered her son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Rachel wants to know whether her boyfriend is too good to be true. Letisse says her cab-driving boyfriend drove another woman around town for 10 hours.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: In today's episode, guests face the ultimate test of truth with a lie detector. Redemption awaits for some, while shocking lies will be exposed for others. The power of the truth will be revealed, transforming their lives in unexpected ways.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Greg tells Kim that he wants to start dating Mandy. Shannon confronts Dominic and friend Brandy for their affair. Plus, Leah wants her girlfriend Mary to choose between her or her ex Richelle!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kenny reveals to Kamiko that he cheated on her with his best friend's woman. Scott says he's losing his one true love, Cassye. Plus, Jason is here to win back his ex DJ, But DJ's new love Jake isn't about to give him up without a fight.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jaycee shows Brandy that it’s never ok to cheat and ruin a family. Casi feels her fiancé could learn a lesson from past guest Kevin. Plus, we set viewer Tamara and guest Nathan up on a date.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mehren says everything would be just great with her boyfriend, John, if only his wife would leave them alone! Greg is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend, Yolanda!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Desiree's worried about the rumors that her man is sleeping with her sister. But will these sisters really battle for Cruz's love? Will Bryant take back Jalissa after she cheated?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jessyca thinks that Shon and Mellisa may be having a secret relationship. Christine is here to tell her friend Chelsie that Carl isn't the faithful boyfriend she thinks he is. Plus, Char's man, June, gets revenge by having sex with Erin.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tracy and Allen have been living in a car. Her two older sisters are here to convince her to temporarily live with them and go back to school until he can provide for them.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Shianne comes clean about cheating on Mistress Delicious with her mom Blonde. Then, Chris’ baby’s mother confronts him about leaving her for their threesome partner!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jamie is here to tell his ex-lover that he actually left her for a guy! Next Amy says her ex-boyfriend is a chronic cheater and she wants nothing to do with him. Then Jasmine is here to teII her boyfriend that she's really a man!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Anitra learns who her partner Kevin really is! Next James is weeks away from marrying Liz, but he has two big secrets to reveal. Then Elliot says he made the mistake of his life when he cheated on his boyfriend, Rob!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Infieles, infieles y más infieles! El episodio de hoy de MAURY está lleno de drama, asombro y tentación. ¡Estos invitados simplemente no saben controlar sus acciones ante una tentación y se encuentran en un grave problema con sus parejas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Waldo se niega a ser el padre del bebé de Chelsea por su piel clara. Después, Kianna encontró fotos de mujeres desnudas en el teléfono de Nick y condones y colonia en su bolso de gimnasio. ¿Qué dirán los resultados del detector de mentiras de Maury?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Es Cortney el padre de los hijos de Brittany? Según su hermana, Brittany fue infiel con su prometido Clifton. Después, Melissa afirma que su ex-marido no es el padre de sus gemelos y que es Sean! ¿Lo confirmarán los resultados del ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Shenik y Shenequa aparecieron en el programa de Maury el año pasado después de una prueba de ADN. ¿Pero ahora Shenik se acuesta con el novio de su hermana? Además, lo único que se interpone son los resultados de la prueba del detector de mentiras.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Danica, una nueva mamá, recibió 5 correos electrónicos diferentes de 5 mujeres asegurando que se acostaron con su novio, Jimmy, en su casa. Entonces, ¿el novio de Renee preferirá su adicción a su familia?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Dashawn y su mamá afirman que lo de Monica fue una aventura de una sola vez y que él no puede ser el padre de su bebé. Entonces, April quiere averiguar quién es el padre de su bebé. Después, ¿Frederick o Jason es el padre del bebé de Marietta?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury está celebrando las fiestas contando cuentos junto a la chimenea. Compartirá las historias de los antiguos invitados que vinieron a hacerse pruebas de paternidad, al detector de mentiras y más. ¡Averigua si estos invitados han sido buenos o malos!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de hacer 5 pruebas de ADN, Rebecca regresa con 2 hombres más para encontrar al padre de su nuevo bebé. Después, Don y su esposa se alegraron al descubrir que su hijo no era el padre del bebé de Jessica, pero ella cree que Don es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Don y Amy contrataron a Jessica para cuidar a su hijo, Steven. Años más tarde, Jessica dice que Steven es el padre de su hijo. Además, Marisol ha hecho 16 pruebas de ADN para encontrar al padre de su hijo. ¿La prueba número 17 será la definitiva?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva y Silvia entran a la casa de María Julia para exigirle a Karina que les entregue la carta de Maximiliano. Luis Mario le cuenta a Gabriel lo de Silvano.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le informa a Eduarda y a Maribella que el comisario le dijo que no sabía nada de su hija. Maribella le dice a Luis Mario que ella le puede dar hijos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Imanol le dice a Adriana que le de otra oportunidad pero Adriana grita que lo odia y Iván sale, preguntándole a Imanol que fue lo que le hizo a ella para que lo odie.

programme.desc: Ignacio le pide a Octavia que pongan una fecha para casarse. Pancholón intenta forzar a Caramelo aprovechando que ella decidió cuidarlo. Marfil le reclama a Maximiliano por no darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico Robin finds herself trapped on the island of Tequila Wolf: a miserable land where children are forced to work as slaves. Elsewhere, Usopp tries to survive a run-in with a man-eating plant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is held against his will by the pink-haired princess of bad vibes, Brook gets mistaken for the king of darkness, and Luffy continues to eat his way toward a reunion with Fire-Fist Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Boa arrive at Impel Down, but only thirty-three hours remain until Ace's execution. To save him, the Snake Princess must find a way to hide Luffy during her full-body search!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Time is running out on Ace, so Luffy teams up with a scoundrel who's going to pieces trying to escape Impel Down. There's no love lost between the former foes, but they'd better work together if they want to survive.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must part ways with a priceless treasure map before Buggy the Clown agrees to lead him through the bloody tangle of Blade Trees and Spike Needle Grass that make up Impel Down's Crimson Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Buggy the Clown could end up as hippo food if they aren't careful in Impel Down's Wild Beast Hell. Of course, the rubber-man might find that a better fate than dealing with the prison's putrid warden!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stumble upon a most peculiar village when they hitch a ride on a fire-breathing beetle. The natives are petrified of pirates, but they welcome the Straw Hats with open arms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The citizens of Little East Blue throw in a feast in honor of the Straw Hats, but when the Amigo Pirates try to capture Boss the Beetle, Luffy and his crew will have to defend their new friends.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji prepare to do battle on behalf of Boss the Beetle, but Captain Largo of the Amigo Pirates counters with a deadly arsenal of nets to put the Straw Hat brawlers on lock down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks into Second Gear for his rematch with Largo, and Nami leads the islanders as they lay waste to the Amigo Pirates. Boss the Beetle may be safe for now, but someone sinister lurks behind the scenes.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to stay a step ahead of a prison patrol made up of hungry lions and poisonous scorpions! Meanwhile, Ace spends what could be his final hours swapping stories with a pirate who hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the guards struggle to squelch a violent prison uprising, Luffy and his fellow fugitives try to keep their cool in a level of Impel Down known as Starvation Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock uses her ample assets to buy some private time for a clandestine chat with Ace. Meanwhile, Luffy needs help from a graceful friend to escape the jaws of a hungry Sphinx!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Bon are on the verge of reaching Level 4, but they didn't count on fighting a demonic, lightning-fast, devastatingly powerful Minotaur! To defeat this beast, they'll need help from a human candle and a deranged clown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy narrowly avoids a deadly dip in the boiling pool of blood, only to find himself face to face with Warden Magellan. Meanwhile, outside the prison walls, the marine fleet prepares for Whitebeard's onslaught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Warden Magellan is a monster of a man with a penchant for poisoning prisoners. To rescue Ace, Luffy must go toe to toe with this toxic terror, but how do you defeat a foe who's deadly to the touch?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's daring assault on the venomous warden of Impel Down leaves him struggling to stand up, but despite the lethal poison breaking down his body, the rubber-man kicks his rescue mission into Second Gear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy hovers perilously on the verge of death, Bon Clay embarks on a suicidal rescue mission plagued by sub-zero temperatures and bloodthirsty wolves with a supremely savage disposition!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: No existing antidote can save Luffy from the poison coursing through his veins, yet Bon Clay refuses to give up. His final, fleeting hope is a mysterious miracle-worker rumored to have vanished into the Gates of Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bon is overjoyed to hear that Luffy is still alive, but his happiness quickly turns to shock when he learns that Ivan's agonizingly painful "Healing Hormones" will cost the rubber-man ten years of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is scheduled to be executed in a matter of hours, and Luffy's still hovering on the verge of death. It will take a miracle to save them both, but Bon would rather die than give up on his friend!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy miraculously survived his brush with death, but he's far too weak to finish rescuing Ace. Ivan is reluctant to lend a hormonal hand to the doomed rescue mission – until he learns of Luffy's lineage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The quest to rescue Ace tuckers out thanks to a blast of sleeping gas! Ivan's scissor-handed sidekick puts an end to nap time, but Luffy will have to join forces with a scar-faced foe from the past if he wants to complete his mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's desperate attempt to rescue Ace is bolstered by two powerful new allies: the murderous Crocodile and the honorable fishman Jinbei. Meanwhile, Ivan sparks a prison riot to create a diversion for the rubber-man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang of outlaws cause a commotion on Level Four, Blackbeard's arrival leads to the release of the prison's most feared inmate, and Ace gazes upon the great blue sky for what could be the very last time!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ivan undergoes a curvaceous transformation to better battle sadistic Sadie, the commander of the Demon Guards. Meanwhile, Blackbeard and Shiryu head for a showdown on Level 1!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's bone-crushing battle with the Vice Warden of Impel Down is interrupted by the sudden appearance of Blackbeard. When the rubber-man hears what the warlord has to say – heads will roll!

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Precipitate

programme.desc: The agents must find a woman, Eve, who changes her appearance to suit whatever modeling or acting job she is seeking. No one seems to know Eve well, including her roommate.

programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of Anwar Samir, a Saudi Arabian medical intern, who became upset when his boss refused his request and his girlfriend declined his proposal.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati learns that carne asada goes way beyond grilled meat in Sonora. It’s an important weekly ritual that brings the whole family together. Back home, Pati throws a carne asada in her backyard for her husband and boys.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Sonoran wheat has shaped the cuisine of the entire Mexican north and is a staple of Sonoran cuisine. Pati tours one of Hermosillo’s oldest flour mills and gets a lesson on making coyotas, a traditional dessert, at a local bakery.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in the kitchen with her middle son, Sami, cooking recipes inspired by her travels in Sonora that she knows he’ll love – beef and potato chimichangas, rice with lentils and caramelized onions, and an avocado and radish salad.

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Female chef Yoshiko Takemasa is so fastidious that she only cooks fish caught by rods, not nets, to ensure no bruising.

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team seeks out the legendary Tall Man in South Dakota.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Return to Boggy Creek
programme.desc: The team travels to Fouke, AR, home of the 1972 bigfoot documentary, "The Legend of Boggy Creek." With a long history of sightings near this small town, the team takes to the surrounding swamps in hopes of proving Arkansas' bigfoot is more than a legend.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Kung-Fu Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to China in search of the Yeren, a bipedal, hair-covered ape similar to Bigfoot. Little is known about this elusive creature, but the team uses their bigfooting skills to try and prove China's Yeren is more than just legend.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Sketching Sasquatch
programme.desc: The team travels to the California/Nevada border to investigate audio recordings of a possible sasquatch obtained near Lake Tahoe. While blasting calls throughout multiple valleys in the Sierras, they discover some of their best evidence to date.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Lonestar Sasquatch
programme.desc: The team travels to East Texas to investigate thermal footage that may show a bigfoot spying on a campsite. Convinced by the evidence, they enlist the aid of primate tracking dogs in hopes of proving bigfoots do roam the Lonestar State.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Big Sky Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to Big Sky Country to investigate sasquatch activity near the city of Bozeman, MT. After meeting witnesses, they enlist the aid of a dog sled team to take them into a nearby valley, where they set up a fake deer trap to lure a bigfoot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bigfoot of Oz
programme.desc: The team travels to the heartland to determine if bigfoots live on the great plains of Kansas. With help from eyewitnesses, they narrow their search to waterways outside of Wichita where they take to the sky and employ a unique baiting technique.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Super Yooper Sasquatch
programme.desc: The team travels to the Upper Peninsula of Michigan to investigate a photo of a sasquatch. With witnesses in this region claiming bigfoots have been stalking them, the team deploys a U.P. delicacy in hopes a sasquatch has the same appetite as the locals.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: South Jersey Sasquatch
programme.desc: The team visits the Garden State for the first time. After their successful night investigation, they hold a town hall meeting to gather more witnesses. The team investigates a refuge that used to be a cranberry bog trying to prove bigfoots live in NJ.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Coal Miner's Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels back to West Virginia to investigate recent recordings of possible bigfoot howls. With the help of a radio show, the team reaches out to witnesses from across the state and rafts deep into the holler in hopes of finding a bigfoot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Squatters for Sasquatch

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El beso de Alejandro despierta los traumas de Gabriela. Antonia se da cuenta de que David podría ser su nieto. Alejandro sorprende a Gabriela pidiéndole matrimonio. El Tigre rechaza el soborno de Antonia. Confirman que hay oro en el Chamuco.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro y Gabriela hacen el amor y ella le confiesa que fue violada. Él promete ayudarla a superar su trauma. Alejandro defiende a su futura esposa ante los mineros y de la maldad de Antonia. El parecido de David con Fernando impresiona a todos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El senador Villegas aconseja sin éxito a su ahijado que no siga con la minera. Alejandro y Gabriela planean irse de San Pedro, y el Tigre los apoya. Mientras, Antonia quiere hacer una prueba de ADN para saber quién es el padre del pequeño David.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro empieza a ganar terreno con David. Antonia convence a su hijo mayor de quedarse en San Pedro, se muestra arrepentida y anuncia en las fiestas patronales la futura boda, dejando boquiabiertos a todos. Fernando es internado por su adicción.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llama a una ambulancia para salvar a Óscar, Juan confirma que las Elizondo saben todo sobre Libia. Eva confiesa lo que hizo y su rencor hacia Gabriela y revela el secreto de su hija.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma y Jimena llegan a la hacienda y se enteran de la traición de Eva, Fernando y Sara quieren denunciarla a ella y a los Reyes, mientras Gabriela retiene a sus hijas para protegerlas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Se arma una fuerte pelea cuando los Reyes llegan a la hacienda para hablar con Norma y Jimena. Eva se va de la hacienda por orden de Fernando y Raquel le prohíbe que se acerque a su hija Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando ordena un ataque contra los hermanos Reyes, Franco encuentra una oportunidad para revertir la desgracia de su familia después de perder a Rosario. Norma se empeña en olvidar a Juan.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad persigue al supuesto ladrón y entra a una mina, seguirla es para Hugo como regresar al ataúd, por la condición de su enfermedad. Todo puede pasar cuando Beatriz y Alcides se encuentran.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Alcides y Soledad se mudan a la hacienda Montenegro. Alcides levanta sospechas e intrigas por las alucinaciones provocadas por el medicamento que le inyecta el doctor Max.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Beatriz cita a Alcides para asesinarlo, se desata una peligrosa balacera. Soledad ve a Hugo en el pueblo, pero Úrsula y sus padres no le creen, ella hace lo posible por constatarlo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad comprueba que Hugo vive y quiere contarle que está embarazada, pero todo sale mal, Alcides la busca. Rebeca aparenta ser una heroína cuando Hércules intenta matar a Esther.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El beso de Alejandro despierta los traumas de Gabriela. Antonia se da cuenta de que David podría ser su nieto. Alejandro sorprende a Gabriela pidiéndole matrimonio. El Tigre rechaza el soborno de Antonia. Confirman que hay oro en el Chamuco.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro y Gabriela hacen el amor y ella le confiesa que fue violada. Él promete ayudarla a superar su trauma. Alejandro defiende a su futura esposa ante los mineros y de la maldad de Antonia. El parecido de David con Fernando impresiona a todos.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop on the Seychellian island of Praslin and fly to Penang, Malaysia, heading to the Snake Palace.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Pinang Peranakan Mansion in Penang, Malaysia and head to Singapore, where they learn that a U-Turn awaits.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Marina Barrage in Singapore and fly to Shanghai, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Shanghai Science and Technology Museum, with Louie and Michael knowing a Speed Bump awaits them.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Brent and Caite, Jet and Cord, and Dan and Jordan leave Shanghai and head to San Francisco and the finish line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: This season's racers are introduced and for the first time in the history of The Amazing Race, the team to finish in first place will be awarded a surprise, game-changing advantage.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One team considers using their precious Express Pass after playful Ghanaian locals give some teams a headache while they struggle to complete the high-stakes roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A challenging detour tests one couple's relationship, while another team's Racer requires medical attention, threatening their position in the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After teams volunteer at a local school in Ghana, THE AMAZING RACE makes it's first-ever trip to the Arctic Circle, where one couple finds themselves in an unfortunate position and contemplate making a game changing decision.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A vegetarian racer struggles with a difficult decision when faced with a Norwegian delicacy, and Teams face their fears of heights during a gut-wrenching Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers struggle to complete their creative detours before putting in a proper day's work in the fields, where they discover the key to potato farming is manure.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are clowning around when they learn a traditional Russian circus act, but it's no joke when multiple teams make a critical error and misread a clue, jeopardizing their positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Following a huge mistake, one Racer makes an important decision that will impact their team beyond the finish line and for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tension among the teams runs high when, for the first time ever, two teams are U-turned and have to complete an extra task, jeopardizing their chances of making it to the final four.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Through a series of coincidences, Barney captures a dangerous criminal--twice.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy helps a local musician get back to reality after success goes to his head.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Aunt Bee find that a good father-son relationship is more important to Opie than keeping him away from the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy teaches his son how to handle a seven-year-old bully.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney resigns when he thinks Andy is trying to ease him out of his deputy sheriff job.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An attractive young woman, who has been given a speeding ticket by Andy, pleads "not guilty" and uses female guile.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An old penniless citizen of Mayberry forestalls his eviction by trying to redeem a century-old municipal bond.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney almost loses his shirt and his girlfriend when a charming female con artist dupes him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie's friendship with a hobo begins to affect his ability to tell right from wrong.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A bogus FBI agent and his accomplice nearly make off with the Mayberry Bank money.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is too obvious in his efforts to find out if a young lady meets his expectations.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee takes a shine to an itinerant handyman who has a way with the ladies.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy refuses to join an exclusive club when Barney's bid for membership is turned down.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Rather than eat Aunt Bee's indigestible homemade pickles, Andy and Barney secretly substitute store-bought pickles in her preserving jars.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A trial run as Sheriff of Mayberry convinces Barney that he is not quite ready to take over a similar job in a neighboring town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy dissuades a visiting farmer from marrying Barney's girl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie keeps a secret club oath even in the face of the serious accusation of burning down a barn.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy teaches a wealthy young man the satisfaction of self-reliance.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The men of Mayberry, after a slow start, accept the addition of a lovely manicurist to Floyd's barbershop.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Mayberry resident is convinced that he is a jinx until Andy helps restore his selfconfidence.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The small-town methods of Mayberry prove more effective than the attempts of the State Police in the capture of a criminal.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After Opie finishes last at a track race, Andy struggles to teach his son what it means to be a good loser.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy’s diplomacy and engineering skills are required to help the Mayberry choir adjust to the recent addition of tone-deaf Barney Fife to the group.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney are hard pressed when Mayberry's guest of honor turns out to be a pickpocket.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy uses his wits to help a struggling salesman stay in Mayberry despite strong pressure from the competition.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee becomes warden for a day when she disciplines Otis Campbell after he is arrested for his usual drunken behavior.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is forced to exert all his persuasiveness to get a farmer to take a tetanus shot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A weathered fence guards a rustic country home shadowed by tall trees as Bob Ross creates another masterpiece in his unique style.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Looking back to those 'days of old', Bob Ross paints a delightful little fishing village with luscious leafy trees in an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates the illusion of luscious textured wood as you are invited to step into another dimension of mountains overlooking a quiet northern river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates soft purple sky and tall trees that almost seem to float in the hazy foothills of a distant, blue-grey mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross and experience the quiet motionless beauty of a glassy river as the morning fog hangs onto the distant shore.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll along the beach at sunset with Bob Ross and feel the gentle breezes blow as the waves softly kiss the shore in this oval masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross employs a unique technique, using both black and white basecoats, to create a happy little stream tumbling down a rocky meadow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to a picturesque spot in the meadow and delight in the discovery of not one, but two serene fishing holes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the cool breeze and admire the beauty of turbulent waves, jagged cliffs, and dark night skies -- Bob Ross paints a west coast seascape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross helps a timid little stream find its way to a delightful waterfall while gazing upon a forest of elegant trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a stroll with Bob Ross deep into the swamp and breathe in the fragrances of damp earth and moss-filled trees on a rill bank.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The beach is such a lovely sight as afternoon comes to an end - Bob Ross paints this seascape with gold, purple and orange hues.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The versatility of Bob Ross's easy method is dramatically illustrated by this mighty tide crashing into a rock-lined shore.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The colorful Milky Way is the backdrop for striking silhouettes of happy little Bob Ross trees in this night scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the mystique of snowflakes gently tumbling in the silence of the forest. Join Bob Ross for this lovely winter masterpiece!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: What a delicate view of polar beauty; Bob Ross taps his brushes to make subtle hills, sleeping grasses, and leafless trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A path of cacti and rocks lead right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky, all from the delicate motions of Bob Ross' paint brush.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow along with Bob Ross as he takes you into the incredible beauty of the dry lands. A unique oval painting for beginners and accomplished artists as well.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Gently rolling mountains make an amazing backdrop for this Bob Ross masterpiece; a winding stream and textured ground vegetation provide the rest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a breathtakingly beautiful seascape on black canvas today, complete with fierce skies, jagged cliff and raging ocean waves.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits the world's largest crocodile farm and assists in the capture of a 14-foot reptilian destined for a Thailand education center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Panama's Bocas del Toro archipelago is home to beautiful beaches and pristine waters, and it's also home to a high concentration of Bats! Jack hikes into a remote cave for an up-close look at the beneficial species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Camouflage Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he’s counting down ten of his favorite encounters with the masters of camouflage.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he honors the hard-working moms of all species, like Brown Bears, Chimpanzees, Elephants, Nyala Antelope, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: See a pattern on this Wild Countdown? Whether it’s for camouflage or advertising deadly venom, every creature on today’s countdown is sporting stripes. Tigers, zebras, sea snakes, ring-tailed lemurs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading into devil country in Tasmania, Australia to meet up with leading-edge researchers who are working to save Tasmanian Devils from a deadly cancer that is wiping out the population.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Riskiest Adventures
programme.desc: Join Jack for some of his favorite moments of heroism, bravery and lunacy, as he counts down his riskiest animal encounters ever. Sharks, alligators, lions and cobras are just a few of the animals joining in on this Wild Countdown.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: How in the world do bats find their way in the dark? How do caterpillars turn into butterflies? How long can tortoises really live? The world has questions, and Jungle Jack has answers on today’s Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: See Jack dive with a bull shark, encounter a highly venomous sea snake and get in a sticky situation with a sea creature. Then Jack takes part in some local traditions and learns of Fiji's ominous past.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: The watery world of Dominica, one of the Caribbean's most pristine islands, provides Jack and his daughter Kathaleen with an unforgettable island adventure.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Some animals have been using social networks for eons, like herds of elephants, colonies of ants and bees, hyena clans and even chimpanzees. Today, Jungle Jack will see what it takes to get “likes” from these special species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Take a trip with Jack and the Hanna family to Bruny Island in Tasmania. See an all-white wallaby, watch wild fur seals at play and go on a thrilling boat ride on the Tasman Sea that ends with a surprise dolphin encounter.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack behind the scenes for some of his most memorable moments like getting pecked by an ostrich, tangling with a snake, taking fashion advice from a Samburu warrior, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Bottoms Up
programme.desc: Jungle Jack goes to the ends of the Earth to meet nature's most captivating creatures! Today, adventures from the frigid waters of South America to elephant country in Africa and all the way up to Alaska's Glacier Bay.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack for his favorite gorilla treks from Rwanda's Virunga Mountains. The Hanna's also visit veterinarians working with the wild gorillas, and a very special orphanage.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: What do jackals, sharks and leopards have in common? They’re scavengers, some of the most resourceful creatures! They survive on the remains that hunters leave behind, whether it’s deep in the woods, at the bottom of the sea, or even up a tree!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Central Florida, Jack assists in the release of eight captive-born Whooping Cranes, considered among the rarest and most endangered birds in the world. Jack also goes up in a helicopter for the annual survey of Florida's Bald Eagle population.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Smarts
programme.desc: Today’s animals are headed to the top of the class! Jungle Jack counts down some of nature’s most clever creatures, like dolphins, chimpanzees, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen share a boating adventure exploring the animal-rich rainforest surrounding the Panama Canal, including Howler and Capuchin monkeys and the deadly Fer de Lance snake.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to his home state of Tennessee! He meets a one-of-a-kind farm animal living life to the fullest with a prosthetic leg, and a dedicated caregiver who's helping loads of native species get a second chance.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: The animals on today’s show like to stick together. Join Jungle Jack as he counts down the planet’s party animals, like baboons, buffalos, flamingos, painted dogs, and more wildebeest than you can imagine!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Sao Paulo, Jack visits the famed Institute BuTanTan, which has been producing anti-snake bite serum since 1900. In research labs, Jack encounters Brazilian Rattlesnakes, Jararacas and 50,000 poisonous spiders.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack in Kenya as he tracks a trio of hunting cheetahs, braves a pack of scavenging jackals, and then with his wife Sue meets an extremely endangered and undeniably cute baby black rhino.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is headed to Alberta, Canada for a day at the Discovery Wildlife Park. He and Sue meet a couple who have dedicated their lives to helping some of Canada's wildlife survive against the odds, like orphaned porcupines, beavers, and bears.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet the loveable loners of the animal kingdom. Moose, Black Rhinos, Leatherback Sea Turtles, Platypus, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his wife Sue are in Montana meeting up with some amazing people who are taking animal rescue to whole new level! First, a couple that left big city life to run a ranch dedicated to animals in need.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: South Africa is the place for seeing the biggest and most recognizable animals in all of Africa. So today, Jack is heading straight to the famous Shamwari Game Reserve for up-close encounters with elephants, rhinos, lions, and the rest of the Big Five!

programme.desc: In a poignant episode, Doc's former fraternity brother must decide if he should tell Doc the truth about himself and his companion. Two rival designers vie to redecorate the ship and an unorthodox business manager sees his plans go up in flames.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The New Detectives
